author: ghyls
body:
#### PR description:

Add an `MPISenderPortable` and `MPIReceiverPortable` modules to send/receive device collections for which a device TrivialSerialiser plugin exists.

This PR depends on 
- #50490
- #50597

and should be looked at after the two PRs above have been merged.

- The `edmMpiSplitConfig` should be updated to reflect the changes introduced by this PR

#### PR validation:

- Tests are yet to be added
- This PR has been tested with manually-split client and server configurations, involving Pixel, Ecal and Hcal device collections.
title: Add an `MPISenderPortable` and `MPIReceiverPortable` modules to send/receive arbitrary device collections
